name: Profile_R5_Slot_R4
title: Cross-version Profile for R5.Slot resource for use in FHIR R4
description: This cross-version profile allows R5 Slot resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 Slot resources.

element.short: Cross-version Profile for R5.Slot resource for use in FHIR R4
element.definition: This cross-version profile allows R5 Slot resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 Slot resources.

constraint.requirements: Cardinality constraints for appointmentType from R5 for use in FHIR R4

element.comment:
Element `Slot.appointmentType` allows multiple values in the source, but is mapped to an element that does not allow multiple values in the target.
Element `Slot.appointmentType` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Slot.appointmentType` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
A slot may be allow multiple appointment types, but when booked, would only be used for one of the given appointment types.

element.short: R5: The type of appointments that can be booked into this slot (ideally this would be an identifiable service - which is at a location, rather than the location itself). If provided then this overrides the value provided on the Schedule resource additional types
element.definition: R5: `Slot.serviceType` additional types (CodeableReference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/HealthcareService)) additional types from child elements (reference)
element.comment:
Element `Slot.serviceType` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Slot.serviceType` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `Slot.serviceType` do not cover the following types: CodeableReference.
The mappings for `Slot.serviceType` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: reference.
